segments.text: Praise the Lord. Praise the Lord from the heavens; praise him in the heights above.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise him, all his angels; praise him, all his heavenly hosts.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise him, sun and moon; praise him, all you shining stars.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise him, you highest heavens and you waters above the skies.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let them praise the name of the Lord, for at his command they were created,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: he established them for ever and ever— he issued a decree that will never pass away.
Praise the Lord from the earth, you great sea creatures and all ocean depths,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: lightning and hail, snow and clouds, stormy winds that do his bidding,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: you mountains and all hills, fruit trees and all cedars,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: wild animals and all cattle, small creatures and flying birds,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: kings of the earth and all nations, you princes and all rulers on earth,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: young men and women, old men and children.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let them praise the name of the Lord, for his name alone is exalted; his splendor is above the earth and the heavens.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: And he has raised up for his people a horn, the praise of all his faithful servants, of Israel, the people close to his heart.
